title: glochidion nitidum
intro: Glochidion nitidum, also known as the glossy milkwood or the shiny milkwood, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is a small tree or shrub native to Australia, known for its glossy leaves and small, greenish-yellow flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, with reported medicinal properties including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Glochidion nitidum include treating fever, sore throats, and skin conditions, and it is often prepared as a tea or decoction for consumption.
